description: Extend Prisma schema with all new models for Knowledge Base, Agent Memory (4-tier), Learning Insights, and Knowledge Graph. Update seed file with sample data. Add new sidebar navigation item.
steps: Add the following new models to prisma/schema.prisma: KnowledgeEntry (id, title, content, category enum as String: CHAT_HISTORY/FAQ/PRODUCT_INFO/SOP/RESPONSE_TEMPLATE/TONE_GUIDELINE, tags String?, source String?, isActive Boolean, createdAt, updatedAt), AgentMemory (id, tier: WORKING/EPISODIC/SEMANTIC/PROCEDURAL, content, context String?, strength Float default 1.0, accessCount Int default 0, lastAccessedAt, decayFactor Float, metadata String? for JSON, createdAt, updatedAt), LearningInsight (id, type: PATTERN/IMPROVEMENT/SUGGESTION/CORRECTION, content, source String?, confidence Float, applied Boolean default false, appliedAt DateTime?, impact String?, createdAt), KnowledgeGraphEntity (id, name, type: CUSTOMER/PRODUCT/ISSUE/SOLUTION/TOPIC, properties String? for JSON, createdAt, updatedAt), KnowledgeGraphRelation (id, fromEntityId -> KnowledgeGraphEntity, toEntityId -> KnowledgeGraphEntity, relationType String, weight Float default 1.0, metadata String?, createdAt)

Update prisma/seed.ts to add sample data for: 5-8 KnowledgeEntry items covering different categories (sample chat history, FAQ items, product info, SOP for response handling, tone guidelines), 3-4 AgentMemory entries across different tiers, 2-3 LearningInsight entries, and 5-6 KnowledgeGraphEntity with 4-5 KnowledgeGraphRelation entries between them

Add the 'Pengetahuan' nav item to the navItems array in src/app/(dashboard)/layout.tsx with icon Brain from lucide-react, placed before Pengaturan. Also add 'Kecerdasan' nav item with icon Sparkles for the agent intelligence/health page
Run npx prisma generate and npx prisma db push to apply schema changes, then npx prisma db seed to populate sample data
acceptance_criteria: prisma/schema.prisma contains all 5 new models (KnowledgeEntry, AgentMemory, LearningInsight, KnowledgeGraphEntity, KnowledgeGraphRelation) with proper field types and relations
npx prisma generate completes without errors
npx prisma db push applies schema to SQLite without errors
npx prisma db seed runs successfully and populates sample data for all new models
Layout sidebar shows 'Pengetahuan' and 'Kecerdasan' navigation items with correct icons
verification: Run: npx prisma generate && npx prisma db push && npx prisma db seed - all should succeed
Run: npm run build - should compile without TypeScript errors
